summary: The dType Alias is a system for providing human-readable resource identifiers to on-chain content. A resource identifier is based on the type of data (identifier provided by dType, [EIP-1900](./eip-1900.md)) and the data content (identifier provided by a dType Storage Contract, [EIP-2157](./eip-2157.md)). It is a universal way of addressing content, supporting any type of data.
title: dType Alias Extension - Decentralized Type System
